arts.ttl: Full Liverpool and Newcastle United confirmed injury list for Carabao Cup final
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool news ahead of the big Carabao Cup final clash with Newcastle United at Wembley

arts.ttl: Shay Given shares true feelings on what Carabao Cup triumph would mean to Newcastle
arts.sum: Shay Given, who spent 12 years at St James’ Park, will be there to see Eddie Howe’s men take on Premier League champions-elect Liverpool - and he hopes he will get to witness history being made

arts.ttl: Ornstein names €50m star as 'strong option' for Liverpool
arts.sum: David Ornstein has confirmed that Milos Kerkez will be a'strong option' for Liverpool this summer. However, according to David Ornstein of The Athletic, he is a'strong option' for Liverpool this summer.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe refuses to use forbidden c-word ahead of Newcastle's Carabao Cup final clash against Liverpool - with the Magpies looking to end their 70-year trophy drought
arts.sum: Eddie Howe threw himself into the arms of his three sons the last time Newcastle played at Wembley. Not in celebration, but distraction. It feels different on Tyneside this time.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Newcastle Preview: How Liverpool will win Sunday’s EFL Cup final
arts.sum: Late last month, Liverpool and Newcastle United faced off in the Premier League. The Reds strolled to success in a 2-0 win. It was comfortable for the hosts at Anfield with Arne Slot’s men lim...

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk Had no Doubts When Asked to Name His Best-Ever Celtic Teammate
arts.sum: Liverpool legend Virgil van Dijk, one of the greatest defenders in history, hailed a Norway international as the best teammate he ever had at Celtic.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United have something Liverpool can only dream of - and he can become a legend - John Gibson - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: As he walks upon Wembley, Isak is already demanding a place in Newcastle United history. If stats determine the stature of a striker, if figures place him in the pecking order of history, then Alexander Isak is well on his way to living among giants.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United transfer watchlist released, Isak's historic contract offer and Cabaye message
arts.sum: Alexander Isak's contract discussions are booked in for the end of the season at St James' Park with Newcastle United increasingly confident of the player agreeing to a new bumper deal. Suggestions that Callum Wilson will leave at the end of the season will clear up to £5million per year off the wage the bill and there could well be other departures for fringe players such as Matt Targett and Odysseas Vlachodimos to make more headroom ahead of the summer window.

arts.ttl: Barcelona's stance on Luis Diaz emerges as Liverpool given transfer conundrum
arts.sum: Luis Diaz has just two years remaining on his Liverpool contract and the club could be tempted to cash in on the Colombian amid "genuine" interest from La Liga giants Barcelona

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah set for dream Liverpool Carabao Cup scenario after Newcastle blow
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah will be key for Liverpool in the Carabao Cup final on Sunday and Newcastle United will be without their best chance of stopping him
